MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Vladimir Pacheco, Esq., of Campagne & Campagne APC, Tel: 559-255-1637 for plaintiff.
MARIO A. MOYA, Esq., of MOYA LAW FIRM, Tel: 510-926-6521 for defendant.

Hearing was Held. A timely Notice of Contest was received from Plaintiff's counsel regarding paragraph 4 and 10. Plaintiff's counsel requested that, rather than granting the motion at this time, the Court continue the matter to be heard concurrently with the other motion scheduled for September 22, 2025. Counsel argued that both motions involve overlapping issues concerning the efficiency of the trade secret and the sufficiency of the complaint, and to reduce sanctions. The matter argued/discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants Brendan Kline and Brian Everett's Motion to Quash is taken under submission. The Court denies Plaintiff's request for a continuance of this motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***An order GRANTING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO QUASH signed after the hearing.***
